_primary_source: Primary source: (Soffer, 1986) DOI 10.1364/OL.11.000118; (Owechko, 1987) IEEE JQE 25(3):619-634; (Hopfield, 1982) DOI 10.1073/pnas.79.8.2554. Phase-conjugate holographic associative memory (resonator with phase-conjugate mirrors).
title: QA_PHASE_CONJUGATE_MEMORY_CERT.v1
description: Fixture schema for QA Phase-Conjugate Holographic Associative Memory Cert [519]: content-addressable recall built on the exact FWM conjugator of cert [518].

patterns.description: stored patterns, each a phase vector in {1,...,m}

global_phi.description: if set, probe carries a global phase screen; recall must be phase-locked

expected_recall.description: claimed recalled pattern (in the probe's frame)
